center.id: loc-美國魚類及野生動物局-bb5779bd
center.name: 美國魚類及野生動物局
center.summary: 美國魚類及野生動物局是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括紅冠亞馬遜鸚鵡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: https://bibliotecalegalambiental.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2013/11/reglamento_6766.pdf On June 4, 2019, the Corpus Christi Ecological Services Field Office of the US Fish & Wildlife Service announced to the public that the USFWS considers the red-crowned parrot native to Texas in the Rio Grande Valley. However, because parrots were not mentioned in the Migratory Bird Treaty Act of 1918, birds in the Texas portion of their range are not entitled to USFWS protection, and must rely on enacted state and local laws. The USFWS estimated that there are roughly 700 wild red-crowned parrots in the Rio Grande Valley of Texas in 2019, and historical records place parrots in South Texas as early as 1885
